has_opt_in_list.q: Do you have email_list_size > 0 or an active double-opt-in waitlist?

list_size_check.q: Is list size ≥200 identifiable subscribers (not purchased)?

launch_date_known.q: Is launch date (or PH/community spike) within 30 days?

aggressive_ready.q: Is list ≥5k engaged OR ≥1k with documented launch coordination (PH/community)?
